highlights.text: That footprint is my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
1) They wait for (or produce) a rapid elevator down sell.
ES plunged elevator down 90 points in a few hours down to 6817.
I wrote Wednesday at 4pm: “A Failed Breakdown of today’s 6830 daily low is an option.” We triggered this recovered Wednesday evening, and the rip began.
This would setup yet another actionable dip buy, but only on a Failed Breakdown.

I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “The Failed Breakdown of Wednesday 6817 low is a good entry as well.” We swept the Wednesday 6817 low down to 6805, recovered 6817 by noon, and ripped to 6857 before dipping into the close.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into some of the Failed Breakdowns we had this week to produce yesterday’s rip.
I wrote at the time that next targets up were “6915, 6924/31.

post_title: Two Weeks Of Wide Consolidation For SPX. Will It Break Next Week, And What Way? December 15 Plan
